task: Find a list of shorthaired dogs available for adoption within 100 miles of zip code 94587 that are good with kids and cats, and have been on Petfinder for over 30 days.
thoughts: I'll help you find shorthaired dogs available for adoption near zip code 94587 that are good with kids and cats, and have been on Petfinder for over 30 days. Let me start by navigating to the website.
I can see the Petfinder homepage. Let me first dismiss the cookie banner, then click on "Dogs" to start searching.
Good, the cookie banner is dismissed. Now let me click on "Dogs" to search for dogs.

I can see the search results page is loading with Dogs selected, 100 miles distance, and San Mateo, CA location. I need to change the location to zip code 94587. Let me click on the Location field first.
The page has loaded with results showing 7,199 pet results near San Mateo, CA. I need to change the location to zip code 94587. Let me click on the Location edit button (pencil icon).
Let me try clicking directly on the Location text to edit it.
The location field is now cleared and showing "Enter City, State, or ZIP". Let me type the zip code 94587.
I've typed "94587" in the Location field. Now I need to press Enter to apply the location change.
I can see a dropdown suggestion "94587, CA". Let me click on it to select that location.

The page has loaded with 7,647 results for dogs within 100 miles of 94587, CA. Now I need to apply filters. I can see the filter sidebar with: Breed, Age, Size, Gender, Good With, Coat Length, and Color. Let me start by clicking on "Good With" to filter for kids and cats.

The "Good With" filter is expanded showing options: Dogs (3848), Cats (1038), and there should be a "Kids" option below. Let me scroll down slightly to see all options and then check both "Kids" and "Cats".
Let me scroll the page down to see the "Kids" option under Good With.
The page seems stuck. Let me try pressing Page Down to scroll.
Let me first click on the "Cats" checkbox that I can see, and then I'll need to scroll to find "Kids".

I've selected "Cats" (checked, shown in blue). I can see it's now a filter tag at the top. The "Good With" filter shows "1" indicating one selection. I need to scroll down a bit to see the "Kids" option below Cats. Let me scroll down the sidebar area.

I've selected "Cats" (checked, shown in blue). I can see it's now a filter tag at the top. The "Good With" filter shows "1" indicating one selection. I need to scroll down a bit to see the "Kids" option below Cats. Let me scroll down the sidebar area.

The "Cats" filter is applied and results now show 1,038 pets. I can see the "Good With" filter section is still open with Dogs (1010) and Cats (1038) checked. I need to scroll down a bit more in the filter area to see the "Kids" option. Let me scroll down in the filter sidebar.
Let me try clicking on the main content area first and then scrolling the page down.
I see the "Good With" filter is now collapsed. Let me expand it again to also check "Kids".

Good, the "Good With" section is expanded again. I can see Dogs (1010) and Cats (1038) with Cats checked. The "Kids" option should be just below the visible area. Let me try using Tab to move from the Cats checkbox to the Kids checkbox area. Or I could try to use JavaScript... Let me try scrolling the sidebar by using the mouse wheel directly on the filter options area.
I can see there's a partially visible option at the very bottom of the filter area - likely "Kids". Let me scroll down a tiny bit to see it.

It seems the Cats filter got unchecked. I can see there's a partially visible option below Cats. Let me try scrolling the main page down to bring the filter area into better view. Let me click somewhere on the page first and use the scroll.
Let me try scrolling the page from the main content area with a larger scroll amount.

Now I can see all the filter options in the sidebar: Good With, Coat Length, Color, Care & Behavior, Days on Petfinder, and Shelter or Rescue. Let me first click on "Good With" to expand it and select Kids and Cats.

Now I can see all the "Good With" options clearly:
- Dogs (3847)
- Cats (1038)
- Other Animals (39)
- Children 8 and Up (559)
- Children Under 8 (2532)

I need to check "Cats" and both children options for "good with kids". Let me start by checking "Cats".

"Cats" is now checked (shown with the blue checkbox). I can see all the options clearly now. For "good with kids", I should check "Children Under 8" since that would be the broadest "good with kids" filter. Let me check "Children Under 8" (838).

Both "Cats" (838) and "Children Under 8" (838) are checked. The Good With filter shows "2" selections. Now I need to scroll up to find and apply the "Coat Length" filter (set to Short). Let me scroll up.
Let me scroll up to find the Coat Length filter. I'll scroll from a different position.
Let me collapse the Good With section first and then look for other filters.

Now I can see all the remaining filters clearly: Good With (2), Coat Length, Color, Care & Behavior, Days on Petfinder, and Shelter or Rescue. Let me click on "Coat Length" to expand it and select "Short".
I can see the Coat Length options: Short (424), Long (11), Medium (111), Wire (11), Hairless (0), Curly (6). Let me click on "Short" to select it.

Excellent! "Short" coat length is now checked (424 results). The Coat Length filter shows "1" badge. Now I need to apply the last filter - "Days on Petfinder" for 30+ days. Let me collapse the Coat Length section and find the Days on Petfinder filter. Let me scroll down a bit to find it.
Now I can see the "Days on Petfinder" filter. Let me click on it to expand it.
The "Days on Petfinder" filter is expanded showing options: 1 Day, 3 Days, 5 Days, 10 Days. I need to scroll down to find the "30 Days" option. Let me scroll down slightly in this area.
Let me scroll the main page down to see more Days on Petfinder options.
